docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CANDELSTICK COVE AS TO DEFENDANT ATANGAN, SARINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2012 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $55.00 - WITH ATTACHED PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL - SERVED NOV-30-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ATANGAN, SARINA
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
